channel.title: cyclotriphosphazene; electrochemistry; nitronyl nitroxide; nucleophilic substitution; polyradicals on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in cyclotriphosphazene; electrochemistry; nitronyl nitroxide; nucleophilic substitution; polyradicals on LMI

item.title: Synthetic Access To A Pure Polyradical Architecture: Nucleophilic Insertion Of Nitronyl Nitroxide On A Cyclotriphosphazene Scaffold
